page.title: Device authorizations
page.description: In-flight OAuth 2.0 Device Authorization Grant (RFC 8628) flows. Each user code is what a person types on a second screen to approve a device. Revoke any flow you don’t recognize before it’s redeemed.

list.title: Active flows
list.emptyDescription: Device-flow authorizations appear here while they await approval or expiry.

revoke.title: Revoke this device authorization?
revoke.descriptionNamed: The device polling with user code {{code}} will be denied and can no longer be approved. This can’t be undone.
revoke.descriptionFallback: The device flow will be denied and can no longer be approved.
